title: Keshava
overview: Keshava, A law college student is on a hunt down to kill all those who destroyed his family in a dreadful accident. Keshava commits a series of murders and a special officer is appointed to deal with the case. Rest of the story is as to how Keshav dodges the cops and completes his revenge with the help of Satyabhama.
